name: qr-code-scanner
title: QR Code Scanner
description: Scans QR codes from current screen
author: arshadmadavoor

commands.name: scan-qr-code
commands.title: Scan QR Code
commands.description: Scans QR code from screen if there is only a single QR on screen
commands.subtitle: Scans QR code from Screen

commands.name: scan-multiple-qr-codes
commands.title: Scan Multiple QR Codes
commands.description: Scans and lists contents of all QR codes present on screen
commands.subtitle: Scan All QR Codes From Screen

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
